   149→    function t(k){return (I18N[state.lang]&&I18N[state.lang][k])||k;}
   150→    function applyLang(){document.documentElement.lang=state.lang;document.documentElement.dir=state.lang==='ar'?'rtl':'ltr';document.body.classList.toggle('en',state.lang==='en');document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el=>{el.textContent=t(el.dataset.i18n)});$('langBtn').textContent=state.lang==='ar'?'English':'العربية';}
